```{r fusions-display-table}
if (is.null(fusions) || nrow(fusions) == 0) {
  cat("\n::: {.callout-note}\nNo gene fusions detected in this sample.\n:::\n")
} else {
  fusions_display <- fusions |>
    mutate(
      # ESMO notation: double-colon separator (gene_a::gene_b)
      fusion_name = case_when(
        "fusion_name" %in% names(fusions) ~ fusion_name,
        all(c("gene_a", "gene_b") %in% names(fusions)) ~
          paste0(gene_a, "::", gene_b),
        TRUE ~ alteration %||% "Unknown"
      )
    ) |>
    select(
      `Fusion`           = fusion_name,
      `Type`             = any_of(c("type", "fusion_type", "event_type")),
      `Breakpoint 5'`    = any_of(c("breakpoint_a", "breakpoint_5prime", "bp1")),
      `Breakpoint 3'`    = any_of(c("breakpoint_b", "breakpoint_3prime", "bp2")),
      `Supporting Reads` = any_of(c("supporting_reads", "split_reads", "read_count")),
      `Known Fusion`     = any_of(c("known_fusion", "is_known", "cosmic_fusion"))
    )

  fusions_display |>
    gt() |>
    tab_header(
      title = md("**Gene Fusions**"),
      subtitle = md(glue("*{nrow(fusions_display)} fusion(s) detected*"))
    ) |>
    cols_align(align = "center", columns = any_of(c("Supporting Reads", "Known Fusion"))) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold", font = "monospace"),
      locations = cells_body(columns = Fusion)
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#fafafa"),
      locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(fusions_display), by = 2))
    ) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(85),
      table.font.size = px(13),
      heading.align = "left",
      table.border.top.color = "#1565c0",
      table.border.top.width = px(3)
    )
}
```
